app_name.description: Extension name shown in the toolbar, the extensions page, and the popup heading. 'Hope Agent' is the product brand and stays untranslated.

app_description.message: 用 Hope Agent 控制 Chrome
app_description.description: Extension description shown on the extensions page and the Chrome Web Store tile. Keep it under 132 characters. 'Hope Agent' stays untranslated.

status_checking.description: Initial popup status line shown while the connection to the desktop app is being read.

btn_stop_current.description: Popup button that detaches Hope Agent control from the active tab.

btn_stop_all.description: Popup button that detaches Hope Agent control from every tab it currently controls.

status_native_connected.description: Status fragment meaning the local desktop app is reachable. Used inside status_summary.

status_native_offline.message: 本地宿主离线——请确认 Hope Agent 桌面应用正在运行。
status_native_offline.description: Popup status line shown when the desktop app cannot be reached. Includes an actionable hint.

status_summary.message: $state$。已接管标签页：$attached$，叠加层标签页：$overlay$。
status_summary.description: Popup status line when connected: connection state followed by how many tabs are controlled. Keep the placeholders; punctuation may be localized.

result_stopped_tab.message: 已停止对标签页 $tabId$ 的控制。
result_stopped_tab.description: Confirmation shown after detaching control from one tab.

result_stopped_count.message: 已停止受控标签页数量：$count$。
result_stopped_count.description: Confirmation shown after detaching control from all tabs. $count$ is the number stopped; phrase it count-agnostically (do not force a singular/plural form).

error_command_failed.description: Generic fallback error when an extension command returns no specific message.

error_no_active_tab.message: 当前 Chrome 窗口没有活动标签页
error_no_active_tab.description: Error shown when 'Stop current tab' is pressed but no tab is active.

error_status_unreadable.description: Status line shown when the popup cannot read the extension's state at all.
